caption: I'm soaking up this golden spring sun on the rooftop terrace in Santorini, feeling every bit the carefree traveler I dreamed of being. The sea breeze is tickling my skin and that linen dress is feeling a little too breezy, but I wouldn't trade this sun-drenched moment for anything. 🌞🌺 #SantoriniVibes #SpringTravel #GoldenHour
